---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Nexus IDE
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
Describe the problem you're trying to solve. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**What feature would you like?**
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

---

## Why This Feature?

**Use Case:**
Describe your specific use case for this feature.

**Problem It Solves:**
How would this feature improve your workflow?

**Benefits:**
List the benefits this feature would provide to you and other developers.

---

## Proposed Solution

**How would you implement this?**
Describe your ideal implementation of this feature.

**Alternative Approaches:**
Any alternative ways to solve this problem?

---

## Additional Context

- **Affected Component:** 
  - [ ] Editor
  - [ ] AI Integration
  - [ ] Git Workflows
  - [ ] Command Palette
  - [ ] Search
  - [ ] Crash Recovery
  - [ ] Diagnostics
  - [ ] Backup Manager
  - [ ] Settings
  - [ ] Other

- **Priority:** 
  - [ ] Low
  - [ ] Medium
  - [ ] High

- **Would you be interested in contributing this feature?** Yes / No

- **Any related issues or discussions?** (Link them here)

---

## Screenshots or Examples

If applicable, add mockups, examples, or screenshots showing your feature idea:

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This is a feature request, not a bug report
- [ ] I have provided clear description and use case
- [ ] I have searched similar feature requests in other open-source projects
